description_long: This object is a stylized, retro-futuristic electric drill with a predominantly red, oval-shaped body and a smooth, streamlined design. The handle is integrated into the lower part of the body, curving downward and matching the red color of the main housing. A yellow lightning bolt graphic is prominently displayed on both sides of the body, adding a decorative and energetic touch. The front features a circular, metallic gray collar with a small, pointed, conical drill bit extending outward. The rear of the drill is capped with a flat, gray disc, and the overall surface shows some wear and subtle texture, suggesting frequent use. There are no visible power cords, battery packs, or ventilation slots, and the trigger button is not clearly defined.
description: A red, retro-styled electric drill with a yellow lightning bolt graphic, metallic gray accents, and a pointed conical drill bit. The design is smooth and streamlined, with a curved handle and no visible power source or trigger button.
description_view_0: The drill is seen from the rear, showing the oval red body and the gray end cap, with the handle extending downward.
description_view_1: A left side view highlights the yellow lightning bolt graphic, the curved handle, and the pointed drill bit at the front.
description_view_2: The front view displays the circular gray collar and the conical drill bit, with the red body forming a rounded backdrop.
description_view_3: A right side view mirrors the left, showing the lightning bolt graphic, handle, and the drill bit, with similar details.
